description: With the consent of the School and the faculty member concerned, a student may be permitted to pursue a course of directed studies.

groupFilter1.name: School of Earth and Ocean Sciences

repeatableCatalogText: May be taken more than once for credit to a maximum of 3 units.
supplementalNotes: • Students may not take more than 3 units of EOS 490 studies.
title: Directed Studies in Earth and Ocean Sciences
